name: Milestone 5: Submissions & Analytics
objective: Admin-facing submissions list/detail views, analytics dashboards with aggregate and per-quiz breakdowns, .xlsx export, and Shopify order attribution webhook handler
exit_criteria: Submissions list page filterable by quiz, date range, search, status with pagination
Submission detail page shows full answer history, result, and recommended products
Analytics aggregate API returns total engagements, completions, conversion rate, revenue, AOV for store
Per-quiz analytics API returns top answers, top products, funnel/abandonment, time-series
Analytics dashboard renders aggregate stats and quiz comparison table
Quiz analytics detail page shows per-quiz breakdown with visualizations
Export API generates valid .xlsx file with submission data
Order attribution webhook links Shopify orders to quiz submissions within 10-day window
Build passes with zero TypeScript errors
All new API routes verify Shopify session from cookie
